title: Implement asset ownership management commands
description: Implement `command_asset()` subcommands for `mark-owned`, `unmark-owned`, and `list`, updating manifest ownership flags by glob and reporting tracked asset ownership and modification status consistently with upgrade logic.
acceptance_criteria: `mark-owned` sets `user_owned: true` for all matched tracked assets and leaves unmatched paths untouched.
`unmark-owned` clears `user_owned` for matched tracked assets so bundled upgrade behavior resumes.
`list` prints tracked assets with ownership and modification status consistent with the manifest and current file state.
Asset ownership commands preserve user-added tracked files as `source: user` and `user_owned: true`.
